title: taraxacum paludosum
intro: Taraxacum paludosum, also known as marsh dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum paludosum include its ability to support liver and kidney function, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues such as constipation and bloating. Taraxacum paludosum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
